This park's placed so that you'll definitely end up passing through it

That's how we know we can engage the enemy here! And they'll

The sahuagin... They all went berserk.

This waterway's connected to Bohelos Castle! Using it, we sahuagin
can hurry there at a moment's notice!
We don't station any brainwashed fighters here, because snapping
them out of it would be the first thing the enemy would try.
The minute the brainwashing's released, our defensive line will be
kaput, so we only ever station demons here.

Why won't the Remnants use the Nursery!? Shit! At this rate,

anymore, so there's no real point in going there.
